Damaso Lara

Born in Zacatecas, raised in Los Angeles. Damaso represents buyers, sellers, and developers across Bel Air, Beverly Hills, and the Westside, in English and Spanish.

The best opportunities are not always obvious. My work is to help clients see clearly and protect their position.
